patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..82e3ce1 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -293,7 +293,7 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
         try:
             # If we have an exception, run the function inside the except block
             # after raising it so exc_info is correctly populated.
-            if exc_info[1]:
+            if exc_info[0]:
                 try:
                     raise exc_info[1]
                 except BaseException:
@@ -309,7 +309,6 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
                 task_context.remove(current_task)
             context[0] = contextvars.copy_context()
 
-
 class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
     """
     Utility class which turns a synchronous callable into an awaitable that
diff --git a/asgiref/timeout.py b/asgiref/timeout.py
index fd5381d..09ccbed 100644
--- a/asgiref/timeout.py
+++ b/asgiref/timeout.py
@@ -93,7 +93,7 @@ class timeout:
                 "Timeout context manager should be used " "inside a task"
             )
 
-        if self._timeout <= 0:
+        if self._timeout < 0:
             self._loop.call_soon(self._cancel_task)
             return self
 
@@ -106,7 +106,7 @@ class timeout:
             self._cancel_handler = None
             self._task = None
             raise asyncio.TimeoutError
-        if self._timeout is not None and self._cancel_handler is not None:
+        if self._cancel_handler is not None:
             self._cancel_handler.cancel()
             self._cancel_handler = None
         self._task = None
@@ -115,4 +115,4 @@ class timeout:
     def _cancel_task(self) -> None:
         if self._task is not None:
             self._task.cancel()
-            self._cancelled = True
+            self._cancelled = True
\ No newline at end of file
